column1: # Synthetic field log of a residential air-source heat pump over one winter.
# Illustrates the fall of COP with outdoor temperature and the defrost penalty.
# Generated for the heat-pump exercises; not measured hardware.
# heat_delivered_kWh: useful heat over the day. elec_input_kWh: electricity in.
# cop_field: delivered/input (includes defrost and cycling losses).
